blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Round 10815 now reruns as reuse/backfill-only for the created challenge with phases fully converged, but resources/submissions/finalScores/provisionalScores still plan creates (836/1445/267/1445), so the full-contract no-op rerun remains a later-milestone blocker rather than a planning-challenge regression.

appliedUpdates.description: Recorded that round 10815 is now a shared post-create fixture (challenge 5fa76bd9-da55-422d-8d4c-4f0155dc62c5) and that its immediate rerun proves challenge/phase reuse but remains partial-backfill for later participant/score surfaces.
